# pihole_adlist (Resource)

Manages an adlist (block or allow list) in PiHole.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pihole_adlist" "stevenblack" {
  address = "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/StevenBlack/hosts/master/hosts"
  type    = "block"
  comment = "StevenBlack unified hosts"
  groups  = [0]
  enabled = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `address` (String) The URL of the adlist.
- `type` (String) The type of the adlist: 'block' or 'allow'.

### Optional

- `comment` (String) An optional comment for the adlist.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the adlist is enabled.
- `groups` (List of Number) List of group IDs this adlist is assigned to.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The address of the adlist (same as address).
